form.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on February 18 at this track over 352m. Last start was third over 352m in 20.21, behind Spring Misty. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Looks close to another win after her success on February 18 at this track over 352m. Last start was third over 352m in 20.21, behind Spring Misty. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 4/5 at Capalaba when a 2.5 lengths second but did run a fast 19.87 over the 366m trip. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 4/5 at Capalaba when a 2.5 lengths second but did run a fast 19.87 over the 366m trip. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 390m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (22.16) behind Appeal in a Grade 5 on April 2. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh over 390m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (22.16) behind Appeal in a Grade 5 on April 2. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 390m in 21.57 last start, beating Bush Boodie. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 390m in 21.57 last start, beating Bush Boodie. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with her.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (20.18) over 352m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Worth including.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 366m at Capalaba in a handy (19.69), beating Cliff Clavin. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 366m at Capalaba in a handy (19.69), beating Cliff Clavin. Can keep things rolling.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 7 over 352m at this track in a Grade 5. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked in the first turn and commenced to give ground.

Dragged down approaching the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 21.92. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Straight over 350m. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fifth over 457m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.
